name: Ciprofloxacin
description: Antibiyootiga Fluoroquinolone oo leh dabool ballaaran oo garaam-negative ah. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa infekshannada dhaawaca halista ah, dhaawaca caloosha gala (GI flora cover), iyo caabuqyada kaadi mareenka. PO iyo IV la heli karo.
warnings: Khatarta dillaaca Tendon, gaar ahaan tendonka Achilles. Jooji haddii xanuunka seedaha uu soo baxo.
Waxa laga yaabaa inay kordhiso muddada QT -- ka taxaddar daawooyinka kale ee QT-dheereeya.
Ka fogow uurka haddii wax kale la heli karo.

pediatric.dose: 10-20 mg/kg IV q8-12h (ugu badnaan 400 mg/qiyaas). PO: 10-20 mg/kg q12h (ugu badnaan 750 mg/qiyaas).
pediatric.note: Isticmaal kaliya marka faa'idooyinka ay ka miisaan badan yihiin halista tendinopathy. Kaydka caabuqyada halista ah.

obstetric.note: Ka fogow uurka haddii wax kale la heli karo. U isticmaal kaliya caabuqyada nafta halis geliya halka faa'iidada ay ka miisaan badan tahay khatarta.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Infectious Disease
